section.heading: Duties of the Secretary
section.chapeau: To the extent appropriate, the Secretary shall assist a producer in achieving the conservation and environmental goals of a program plan by—

paragraph.content: providing payments for developing and implementing 1 or more practices, as appropriate; and
providing the producer with information and training to aid in implementation of the plan.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Pub. L. 110–234 and Pub. L. 110–246 made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by Pub. L. 110–234 were repealed by section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 3839aa–6, Pub. L. 99–198, title XII, § 1240F, as added Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 334, Apr. 4, 1996, 110 Stat. 1001, related to duties of Secretary, prior to the general amendment of this part by Pub. L. 107–171.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2008—Par. (1). Pub. L. 110–246, § 2507, struck out “cost-share payments or incentive” before “payments”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2008 Amendment
note.p: Amendment of this section and repeal of Pub. L. 110–234 by Pub. L. 110–246 effective May 22, 2008, the date of enactment of Pub. L. 110–234, see section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246, set out as an Effective Date note under section 8701 of Title 7, Agriculture.
